questionHtml:
Which gases are acidic?

I.   nitrogen dioxide
II.  carbon dioxide
III. sulfur dioxide

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which gases are acidic? I. nitrogen dioxideII. carbon dioxideIII. sulfur dioxide A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
